parameters.name: rounds
parameters.description: Number of rounds. Rounds repeat all set sizes in order.

parameters.name: samestim
parameters.description: Whether the same stimuli should be used in each round.

parameters.name: trialsperblock
parameters.description: Number of target and foil trials per block (total trials = 2x this).

parameters.name: isi
parameters.description: Inter-stimulus interval. Time in ms of blank screen after response and before next stimulus.

parameters.name: stimset
parameters.description: Characters to sample the stimulus set from. Must contain at least as many as largest set size.

parameters.name: responsemode
parameters.label: Response Mode
parameters.description: Response method: auto (platform-aware), keyboardShift (L/R shift), keyboardSafe (Z/slash for web), arrowLR (left/right arrows), mousetarget (click targets), mousebutton (L/R mouse buttons), userselect (custom keys), touchtarget (large touch targets)

parameters.name: responselabels
parameters.description: Semantic labels for left and right responses
